mapper.select: SELECT P.POST_ID AS postId, P.MEMBER_NO AS memberNo, P.BOARD_TYPE AS boardType, P.TITLE AS title, DBMS_LOB.SUBSTR(P.BODY, 32000, 1) AS body, P.VIEW_COUNT AS viewCount, P.STATUS_CD AS statusCd, P.REG_DATE AS regDate, M.NICKNAME AS authorName, M.MEMBER_NAME AS authorMemberName, M.EMAIL AS authorEmail FROM TB_POST P JOIN TB_MEMBER M ON M.MEMBER_NO = P.MEMBER_NO WHERE P.POST_ID = #{postId} AND P.BOARD_TYPE IN ('TOWN', 'SHARE', 'LIFE')
